action.reasoning: Observation: model.py currently has a syntax error in parse_grounding from a malformed re.findall call, blocking all diagnostics. Analysis: we need restore a working prediction module before training or evaluation; full file rewrite is safer than patching the truncated/broken state. Decision: replace model.py with a syntactically valid Qwen/heuristic wrapper, improve raw generation trimming and parsing, then run the compact probe to inspect Qwen outputs on validation samples.
action.command: python -m py_compile model.py predict.py probe_qwen.py && python probe_qwen.py --n 6 --out logs/probe_qwen.jsonl && python -c "import itertools; print(open('logs/probe_qwen.jsonl').read()[:4000])"
